documentation:
## Aliyun ROS CLICKHOUSE Construct Library

This module is part of the AliCloud ROS Cloud Development Kit (ROS CDK) project.

```python
import * as CLICKHOUSE from '@alicloud/ros-cdk-clickhouse';
```

Attribute DbClusterNetworkType: Network type.

Currently, only VPC is supported.

documentation: Attribute DbNodeClass: Set the node type.

Attribute DbNodeStorage: Single-node storage space.

Value range: 100 GB to 32000GB.

methods.name: ros_cdk_clickhouse.datasource.DBCluster.attr_encryption_key
documentation: Attribute EncryptionKey: Key management service KMS key ID.

methods.name: ros_cdk_clickhouse.datasource.DBCluster.attr_encryption_type
documentation: Attribute EncryptionType: Currently only supports ECS disk encryption, with a value of CloudDisk, not encrypted when empty.

documentation: Attribute IsExpired: If the instance has expired.

documentation: Attribute ResourceGroupId: The ID of the resource group.

methods.name: ros_cdk_clickhouse.datasource.DBCluster.attr_security_ips
documentation: Attribute SecurityIps: The whitelist supports the following two formats:.

methods.name: ros_cdk_clickhouse.datasource.DBCluster.attr_storage_type
documentation: Attribute StorageType: Storage type CloudSSD:SSD cloud disk CloudEfficiency: Ultra cloud disk.

methods.name: ros_cdk_clickhouse.datasource.DBCluster.attr_support_https_port
documentation: Attribute SupportHttpsPort: The system supports http port number.

methods.name: ros_cdk_clickhouse.datasource.DBCluster.attr_support_mysql_port
documentation: Attribute SupportMysqlPort: Supports Mysql, and those of the ports.

methods.name: ros_cdk_clickhouse.datasource.DBCluster.attr_support_oss
documentation: Attribute SupportOss: Whether hot and cold stratification is supported, 0 means not, and 1st generation table supports it.

methods.name: ros_cdk_clickhouse.datasource.DBCluster.attr_vpc_cloud_instance_id
documentation: Attribute VpcCloudInstanceId: Virtual Private Cloud (VPC cloud instance ID.

methods.name: ros_cdk_clickhouse.datasource.DBCluster.attr_zone_id
documentation: Attribute ZoneId: On behalf of the zone resource attribute field.

This class encapsulates and extends the ROS resource type `DATASOURCE::ClickHouse::DBCluster`, which is used to query the information about an ApsaraDB for ClickHouse cluster.

```
Note

```

This class may have some new functions to facilitate development, so it is recommended to use this class instead of RosDBCluster\`\`for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/datasource-clickhouse-dbcluster>

methods.name: ros_cdk_clickhouse.datasource.DBClusterProps.__init__
documentation:
Properties for defining a `DBCluster`.

See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/datasource-clickhouse-dbcluster>

```
param db_cluster_id

Property dbClusterId: Instance ID.

param refresh_options

Property refreshOptions: The refresh strategy for the datasource resource when the stack is updated. Valid values: - Never: Never refresh the datasource resource when the stack is updated. - Always: Always refresh the datasource resource when the stack is updated. Default is Never.
```

methods.name: ros_cdk_clickhouse.datasource.DBClusterProps.refresh_options
documentation:
Property refreshOptions: The refresh strategy for the datasource resource when the stack is updated.

Valid values:

- Never: Never refresh the datasource resource when the stack is updated.
- Always: Always refresh the datasource resource when the stack is updated.
  Default is Never.

methods.name: ros_cdk_clickhouse.datasource.RosDBCluster.refresh_options
documentation:
:Property:

refreshOptions: The refresh strategy for the datasource resource when the stack is updated. Valid values:

- Never: Never refresh the datasource resource when the stack is updated.
- Always: Always refresh the datasource resource when the stack is updated.
Default is Never.

This class is a base encapsulation around the ROS resource type `DATASOURCE::ClickHouse::DBCluster`, which is used to query the information about an ApsaraDB for ClickHouse cluster.

```
Note

```

This class does not contain additional functions, so it is recommended to use the `DBCluster` class instead of this class for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/datasource-clickhouse-dbcluster>

modules.name: ros_cdk_clickhouse
documentation:
## Aliyun ROS CLICKHOUSE Construct Library

This module is part of the AliCloud ROS Cloud Development Kit (ROS CDK) project.

```python
import * as CLICKHOUSE from '@alicloud/ros-cdk-clickhouse';
```

classes.name: ros_cdk_clickhouse.DBCluster

methods.name: ros_cdk_clickhouse.DBCluster.__init__
documentation:
Param scope - scope in which this resource is defined Param id - scoped id of the resource Param props - resource properties.

```
param scope



param id



param props



param enable_resource_property_constraint

```

methods.name: ros_cdk_clickhouse.DBCluster.attr_category
documentation: Attribute Category: The edition of the cluster.

methods.name: ros_cdk_clickhouse.DBCluster.attr_db_cluster_description
documentation: Attribute DBClusterDescription: The description of the cluster.

methods.name: ros_cdk_clickhouse.DBCluster.attr_db_cluster_id
documentation: Attribute DBClusterId: The id of DBCluster.

methods.name: ros_cdk_clickhouse.DBCluster.attr_db_cluster_network_type
documentation: Attribute DBClusterNetworkType: Network type of the cluster instance, value: VPC.

methods.name: ros_cdk_clickhouse.DBCluster.attr_db_cluster_type
documentation: Attribute DBClusterType: The specification of the cluster.

methods.name: ros_cdk_clickhouse.DBCluster.attr_db_node_count
documentation: Attribute DBNodeCount: The number of nodes.

methods.name: ros_cdk_clickhouse.DBCluster.attr_db_node_storage
documentation: Attribute DBNodeStorage: The storage capacity of a single node.

methods.name: ros_cdk_clickhouse.DBCluster.attr_db_node_storage_type
documentation:
Attribute DbNodeStorageType: Instance node storage type.

Valid values:  cloud_essd, cloud_efficiency.

methods.name: ros_cdk_clickhouse.DBCluster.attr_encryption_type
documentation: Attribute EncryptionType: Kms key type, only cloud disk encryption is supported and the value is CloudDisk.

methods.name: ros_cdk_clickhouse.DBCluster.attr_period
documentation: Attribute Period: Prepaid time period.If the payment type is Prepaid, this parameter is mandatory. Specify the prepaid cluster as a yearly or monthly type. Valid values:  Year, Month.

This class encapsulates and extends the ROS resource type `ALIYUN::ClickHouse::DBCluster`, which is used to create an ApsaraDB for ClickHouse cluster.

```
Note

```

This class may have some new functions to facilitate development, so it is recommended to use this class instead of RosDBCluster\`\`for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-clickhouse-dbcluster>

methods.name: ros_cdk_clickhouse.DBClusterProps.__init__
documentation:
Properties for defining a `DBCluster`.

See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-clickhouse-dbcluster>

```
param category

Property category: The edition of the cluster. Valid values: Basic: Single-replica Edition HighAvailability: Double-replica Edition

param db_cluster_network_type

Property dbClusterNetworkType: Network type of the cluster instance, value: VPC.

param db_cluster_type

Property dbClusterType: The specification of the cluster. If the cluster is of the Single-replica Edition, the following values are valid: S4: 4 cores, 16 GB. S8: 8 cores, 32 GB. S16: 16 cores, 64 GB. S32: 32 cores, 128 GB. S64: 64 cores, 256 GB. S104: 104 cores, 384 GB. If the cluster is of the Double-replica Edition, the following values are valid: C4: 4 cores, 16 GB. C8: 8 cores, 32 GB. C16: 16 cores, 64 GB. C32: 32 cores, 128 GB. C64: 64 cores, 256 GB. C104: 104 cores, 384 GB.

param db_cluster_version

Property dbClusterVersion: Version, value: 19.15.2.2.

param db_node_count

Property dbNodeCount: The number of nodes. If the cluster is of the Single-replica Edition, the value ranges from 1 to 48. If the cluster is of the Double-replica Edition, the value ranges from 1 to 24.

param db_node_storage

Property dbNodeStorage: The storage capacity of a single node. Valid values: 100 to 32000. Unit: GB. Note self value is a multiple of 100.

param db_node_storage_type

Property dbNodeStorageType: Instance node storage type. Valid values: cloud_essd, cloud_efficiency.

param payment_type

Property paymentType: The billing method of the cluster. Valid values: Postpaid: pay-as-you-go Prepaid: subscription

param db_cluster_description

Property dbClusterDescription: The description of the cluster.

param encryption_key

Property encryptionKey: KMS key ID.

param encryption_type

Property encryptionType: Kms key type, only cloud disk encryption is supported and the value is CloudDisk.

param period

Property period: Prepaid time period.If the payment type is Prepaid, this parameter is mandatory. Specify the prepaid cluster as a yearly or monthly type. Valid values: Year, Month.

param used_time

Property usedTime: The subscription duration. Valid values: When Period is Month, it could be from 1 to 9, 12, 24, 36. When Period is Year, it could be from 1 to 3.

param vpc_id

Property vpcId: VpcId.

param v_switch_id

Property vSwitchId: VSwitchId.

param zone_id

Property zoneId: ZoneId.
```

methods.name: ros_cdk_clickhouse.DBClusterProps.category
documentation:
Property category: The edition of the cluster.

Valid values:
Basic: Single-replica Edition
HighAvailability: Double-replica Edition

methods.name: ros_cdk_clickhouse.DBClusterProps.db_cluster_network_type
documentation: Property dbClusterNetworkType: Network type of the cluster instance, value: VPC.

methods.name: ros_cdk_clickhouse.DBClusterProps.db_cluster_type
documentation:
Property dbClusterType: The specification of the cluster.

If the cluster is of the Single-replica Edition, the following values are valid:
S4: 4 cores, 16 GB.
S8: 8 cores, 32 GB.
S16: 16 cores, 64 GB.
S32: 32 cores, 128 GB.
S64: 64 cores, 256 GB.
S104: 104 cores, 384 GB.
If the cluster is of the Double-replica Edition, the following values are valid:
C4: 4 cores, 16 GB.
C8: 8 cores, 32 GB.
C16: 16 cores, 64 GB.
C32: 32 cores, 128 GB.
C64: 64 cores, 256 GB.
C104: 104 cores, 384 GB.

methods.name: ros_cdk_clickhouse.DBClusterProps.db_node_count
documentation:
Property dbNodeCount: The number of nodes.

If the cluster is of the Single-replica Edition, the value ranges from 1 to 48.
If the cluster is of the Double-replica Edition, the value ranges from 1 to 24.

methods.name: ros_cdk_clickhouse.DBClusterProps.db_node_storage
documentation:
Property dbNodeStorage: The storage capacity of a single node.

Valid values: 100 to 32000. Unit: GB.
Note self value is a multiple of 100.

methods.name: ros_cdk_clickhouse.DBClusterProps.db_node_storage_type
documentation:
Property dbNodeStorageType: Instance node storage type.

Valid values:  cloud_essd, cloud_efficiency.

methods.name: ros_cdk_clickhouse.DBClusterProps.payment_type
documentation:
Property paymentType: The billing method of the cluster.

Valid values:
Postpaid: pay-as-you-go
Prepaid: subscription

methods.name: ros_cdk_clickhouse.DBClusterProps.db_cluster_description
documentation: Property dbClusterDescription: The description of the cluster.

methods.name: ros_cdk_clickhouse.DBClusterProps.encryption_type
documentation: Property encryptionType: Kms key type, only cloud disk encryption is supported and the value is CloudDisk.

methods.name: ros_cdk_clickhouse.DBClusterProps.period
documentation: Property period: Prepaid time period.If the payment type is Prepaid, this parameter is mandatory. Specify the prepaid cluster as a yearly or monthly type. Valid values:  Year, Month.

methods.name: ros_cdk_clickhouse.DBClusterProps.used_time
documentation:
Property usedTime: The subscription duration.

Valid values:
When Period is Month, it could be from 1 to 9, 12, 24, 36.
When Period is Year, it could be from 1 to 3.

methods.name: ros_cdk_clickhouse.RosDBCluster.period
documentation: :Property: period: Prepaid time period.If the payment type is Prepaid, this parameter is mandatory. Specify the prepaid cluster as a yearly or monthly type. Valid values:  Year, Month.

methods.name: ros_cdk_clickhouse.RosDBCluster.used_time
documentation:
:Property:

usedTime: The subscription duration. Valid values:
When Period is Month, it could be from 1 to 9, 12, 24, 36.
When Period is Year, it could be from 1 to 3.

This class is a base encapsulation around the ROS resource type `ALIYUN::ClickHouse::DBCluster`, which is used to create an ApsaraDB for ClickHouse cluster.

```
Note

```

This class does not contain additional functions, so it is recommended to use the `DBCluster` class instead of this class for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-clickhouse-dbcluster>

methods.name: ros_cdk_clickhouse.RosDBClusterProps.category
documentation:
:Property:

category: The edition of the cluster. Valid values:
Basic: Single-replica Edition
HighAvailability: Double-replica Edition

methods.name: ros_cdk_clickhouse.RosDBClusterProps.db_cluster_network_type
documentation: :Property: dbClusterNetworkType: Network type of the cluster instance, value: VPC

methods.name: ros_cdk_clickhouse.RosDBClusterProps.db_cluster_type
documentation:
:Property:

dbClusterType: The specification of the cluster.
If the cluster is of the Single-replica Edition, the following values are valid:
S4: 4 cores, 16 GB.
S8: 8 cores, 32 GB.
S16: 16 cores, 64 GB.
S32: 32 cores, 128 GB.
S64: 64 cores, 256 GB.
S104: 104 cores, 384 GB.
If the cluster is of the Double-replica Edition, the following values are valid:
C4: 4 cores, 16 GB.
C8: 8 cores, 32 GB.
C16: 16 cores, 64 GB.
C32: 32 cores, 128 GB.
C64: 64 cores, 256 GB.
C104: 104 cores, 384 GB.

methods.name: ros_cdk_clickhouse.RosDBClusterProps.db_node_count
documentation:
:Property:

dbNodeCount: The number of nodes.
If the cluster is of the Single-replica Edition, the value ranges from 1 to 48.
If the cluster is of the Double-replica Edition, the value ranges from 1 to 24.

methods.name: ros_cdk_clickhouse.RosDBClusterProps.db_node_storage
documentation:
:Property:

dbNodeStorage: The storage capacity of a single node. Valid values: 100 to 32000. Unit: GB.
Note self value is a multiple of 100.

methods.name: ros_cdk_clickhouse.RosDBClusterProps.db_node_storage_type
documentation: :Property: dbNodeStorageType: Instance node storage type. Valid values:  cloud_essd, cloud_efficiency.

methods.name: ros_cdk_clickhouse.RosDBClusterProps.payment_type
documentation:
:Property:

paymentType: The billing method of the cluster. Valid values:
Postpaid: pay-as-you-go
Prepaid: subscription

methods.name: ros_cdk_clickhouse.RosDBClusterProps.db_cluster_description
documentation: :Property: dbClusterDescription: The description of the cluster.

methods.name: ros_cdk_clickhouse.RosDBClusterProps.encryption_type
documentation: :Property: encryptionType: Kms key type, only cloud disk encryption is supported and the value is CloudDisk.

methods.name: ros_cdk_clickhouse.RosDBClusterProps.period
documentation: :Property: period: Prepaid time period.If the payment type is Prepaid, this parameter is mandatory. Specify the prepaid cluster as a yearly or monthly type. Valid values:  Year, Month.

methods.name: ros_cdk_clickhouse.RosDBClusterProps.used_time
documentation:
:Property:

usedTime: The subscription duration. Valid values:
When Period is Month, it could be from 1 to 9, 12, 24, 36.
When Period is Year, it could be from 1 to 3.

methods.name: ros_cdk_clickhouse.SynDb.attr_db_cluster_id
documentation: Attribute DbClusterId: The id of clickhouse.

methods.name: ros_cdk_clickhouse.SynDb.attr_rds_id
documentation: Attribute RdsId: The id of RDS.

This class encapsulates and extends the ROS resource type `ALIYUN::ClickHouse::SynDb`, which is used to create a synchronization task for an ApsaraDB for ClickHouse Community-compatible Edition cluster.

```
Note

```

This class may have some new functions to facilitate development, so it is recommended to use this class instead of RosSynDb\`\`for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-clickhouse-syndb>

methods.name: ros_cdk_clickhouse.SynDbProps.__init__
documentation:
Properties for defining a `SynDb`.

See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-clickhouse-syndb>

```
param ck_password

Property ckPassword: The password of the database account.

param ck_user_name

Property ckUserName: The account of the clickhouse database.

param db_cluster_id

Property dbClusterId: Clickhouse cluster id.

param rds_id

Property rdsId: The instance id of RDS.

param rds_password

Property rdsPassword: The password of the RDS database account.

param rds_user_name

Property rdsUserName: The account of the RDS database.

param skip_unsupported

Property skipUnsupported: Skip unsupported table or not.

param syn_db_tables

Property synDbTables: The tables to syn.

param clickhouse_port

Property clickhousePort: The port of clickhouse id.

param limit_upper

Property limitUpper: The maximum number of rows to sync per second.

param rds_port

Property rdsPort: The port of rds.

param rds_vpc_id

Property rdsVpcId: The vpc of rds.

param rds_vpc_url

Property rdsVpcUrl: Intranet address of ApsaraDB for RDS.
```
